fields.name: Questionnaire Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the questionnaire. The code is based on the one that you specified when you created the setup questionnaire.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the question area. You fill in a value for the code when you create a question area for your setup questionnaire.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the question area code.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table that the question area manages. You can select any application table from the Objects window.

fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table that is supporting the setup questionnaire area. The name comes from the name property of the table.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the caption of the table that is supporting the setup questionnaire area. The name comes from the caption property of the table.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: No. of Questions
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of questions that are contained in the question area of the configuration questionnaire.
You can use this field to help monitor and track your questionnaire length. You can also use it to compare the number of fields in the questionnaire to the number of questions in the questionnaire.
